resources.name: app_service_plan
resources.notes: normalized_sku_from:'Premium v3 P1v3 Linux'; shape:{service_name:Azure App Service, sku_name:P1 v3, product_filter:none, usage:none, quantity:1}; resolved via azure_bulk_estimate

resources.name: sql_database_s3
resources.notes: shape:{service_name:SQL Database, sku_name:S3, product_filter:none, usage:none, quantity:1}; resolved via azure_price_search(service_family:Databases) meter 'S3 DTUs' at $4.8387 per 1/Day, projected monthly=(730/24)*4.8387

resources.name: storage_account_blob
resources.notes: shape:{service_name:Storage, sku_name:Standard ZRS, product_filter:General Block Blob, usage:{gb_stored:200,transactions_per_month:10000}, quantity:1}; resolved via azure_bulk_estimate

resources.name: key_vault
resources.notes: shape:{service_name:Key Vault, sku_name:Standard, product_filter:Key Vault, usage:{transactions_per_month:10000}, quantity:1}; resolved via azure_bulk_estimate

resources.name: application_insights
resources.notes: shape:{service_name:Application Insights, sku_name:Basic, product_filter:Application Insights, usage:{gb_stored:5}, quantity:1}; resolved via azure_bulk_estimate

resources.name: log_analytics_workspace
resources.notes: bulk returned projection_warning; retry via azure_price_search found meter 'Standard Data Analyzed' at $2.3 per 1 GB; projected monthly=2.3*5GB

resources.name: private_endpoints
resources.notes: shape:{service_name:Virtual Network, sku_name:Private Endpoint, product_filter:none, usage:none, quantity:3}; resolved via azure_bulk_estimate static fallback ($7.20/endpoint/month baseline)

resources.name: private_dns_zones
resources.notes: retry via azure_price_search (validate_sku:false, no region filter) returned meter 'Private Zone' at $0.50 per zone/month (tierMinimumUnits 0); projected monthly=3 zones*0.50 with queries assumed <1M/month

resources.name: bandwidth_egress_zone1
resources.notes: static_fallback: first 100 GB/month outbound free; requirement is ~50 GB/month

alternative_skus.name: sql_database_s2
alternative_skus.trade_off_notes: Budget downgrade option from S3 (100 DTU) to S2 (50 DTU); halves DTU headroom and may reduce peak throughput margin. Not included in baseline totals.

baseline_mvp.notes: Excludes items 7 and 8 by definition; totals include only resolved priced lines

secure_plus.notes: Recommended scope; totals include only resolved priced lines

optimization_notes: Region comparison skipped: compare_regions=false and primary region is pinned to swedencentral for GDPR/EU Data Boundary.
RI/savings pricing queries skipped: include_ri_savings=false; commitment options are qualitatively applicable after workload stabilization.
Potentially eligible later: App Service and SQL reservations/savings plans once steady-state utilization is observed.
Alternative SKU tracked: SQL Database S2 at $73.62/month (not included in totals); savings vs primary S3 is $73.56/month.
savings_reason: include_ri_savings=false; run requested consumption-leaning baseline without reservation pricing calls
eligible_strategies: Reserved Instances for steady App Service compute
Azure Savings Plan for predictable compute baseline
